# TikTok Campaign — Pioneer Plumbers
## Location: Brambleton, VA
## Generated by: Community Trust Creative Agent

---

**Hook:** Nobody tells you Brambleton's water is basically liquid rock until your water heater dies at year 7.
**Body/Script:** Okay so nobody warns you about this when you move to Brambleton — the water here is SO hard it's eating your tankless heater alive. My dad and I have descaled like a hundred of these exact units in this neighborhood. We're the guys who actually show up — not a call center reading you a script.
**CTA:** Comment "PIPES" and we'll tell you what to check
**Image Prompt:** Fast-cut, handheld-style footage of a young plumber in a Pioneer Plumbers polo descaling a tankless water heater in a bright, modern Brambleton kitchen. Visible scale buildup flakes off the unit as he works.

---
